en_title: Will You Buy the $80 GTA 6 Standard Edition or $100 Ultimate Edition?
cn_title: 《GTA6》标准版80美元(约合人民币545元) vs 终极版100美元(约合人民币681元)
subtitle: 多花20美元(约合人民币136元)，值不值？
opus_summary: Rockstar公布《GTA6》预购详情，标准版80美元(约合人民币545元)(约545元)，终极版100美元(约合人民币681元)(约681元)。

paragraphs.en: It’s one of the biggest questions following Rockstar’s GTA 6 preorder day reveal : will you pay $80 for the Standard Edition or $100 for the Ultimate Edition?
paragraphs.cn: 这是 Rockstar 公布《GTA6》预购详情后，最大的疑问之一：你会花80美元(约合人民币545元)购买标准版，还是100美元(约合人民币681元)购买终极版？

paragraphs.en: The Standard Edition of GTA 6 includes the base single-player experience, but the Ultimate Edition includes exclusive content, such as a mission and shops. The rights and wrongs of charging $20 extra for this content is already being heavily discussed by GTA 6 fans in a debate made all the more vociferous by Rockstar’s decision not to include a disc in the physical version .
paragraphs.cn: 《GTA6》标准版仅包含基础的单人游戏体验，但终极版则会额外提供独占内容，比如一个专属任务和若干商铺。对于这20美元(约合人民币136元)的额外内容是否合理，《GTA6》粉丝们已经展开了激烈讨论，而Rockstar决定实体版不附带光盘的做法更是让这场争论火上浇油。

paragraphs.en: For now, we thought it would be useful to poll the vast and great IGN audience to get their take. So, assuming you will buy GTA 6 in some form (let’s be honest, most of us will!), the question is, which edition? Will you buy the $80 Standard Edition, or the $100 Ultimate Edition? Once you've made your decision in the poll below, let us know why in the comments. We'll follow up with a story reporting on the results later this week.
paragraphs.cn: 目前，我们认为询问广大IGN读者意见会很有帮助。所以，假设你会以某种形式购买《GTA6》（说实话，我们大多数都会买！），问题是，你会买哪个版本？是80美元(约合人民币545元)的标准版，还是100美元(约合人民币681元)的终极版？在下方投票做出选择后，请留言告诉我们原因。我们会在本周晚些时候跟进一篇报道来公布结果。

paragraphs.en: As a reminder, here’s what you get in the GTA 6 Ultimate Edition:
paragraphs.cn: 提醒一下，《GTA6》终极版包含以下内容：

paragraphs.en: Discussion of the price of GTA 6 comes amid speculation it may be the most expensive video game ever made, with parent company Take-Two estimated to have spent $1-1.5 billion so far. Earlier this year, Business Insider suggested the eye-watering budget based on industry analyst estimations as part of an interview with Take-Two CEO Strauss Zelnick. Zelnick wouldn’t say how much the company had spent on GTA 6 so far, but did admit “it was expensive.”
paragraphs.cn: 在围绕《GTA6》售价的讨论中，外界猜测这可能是史上最昂贵的电子游戏，据估计其母公司 Take-Two 迄今已投入 10至15亿美元(约合人民币68至102亿元)。今年早些时候，Business Insider 在一篇对 Take-Two 首席执行官 Strauss Zelnick 的专访中，援引行业分析师的估算，给出了这一令人瞠目的预算数字。Zelnick 不愿透露公司至今在《GTA6》上花了多少钱，但确实承认「很贵」。

paragraphs.en: To put GTA 6 into context, most of the triple-A video game budgets that make headlines do so for being in the hundreds of millions of dollars range. , for example. Concord's initial development deal was around $200 million, according to a report by Kotaku . In 2023, new documents submitted as part of the Xbox Federal Trade Commission case accidentally revealed The Last of Us: Part II and Horizon Forbidden West each cost more than $200 million to develop . Last year, the astronomical development budgets of the Call of Duty games were revealed for the first time after a court document confirmed Activision pumped $700 million into Black Ops Cold War alone, although that was over the shooter's life cycle. GTA 6, clearly, surpasses them all.
paragraphs.cn: 作为参考，大多数能上头条的3A游戏开发预算都处于数亿美元区间。以《星鸣特攻》为例，据Kotaku报道，其初始开发合同金额约为2亿美元(约合人民币14亿元)。2023年，XBOX联邦贸易委员会案中提交的新文件意外曝光，《最后生还者：第二章》和《地平线：西之绝境》各自的开发成本均超过2亿美元(约合人民币14亿元)。去年，《使命召唤》系列天文数字般的开发预算也首次公开——法庭文件证实，动视仅在《黑色行动 冷战》一款游戏的整个生命周期内就投入了7亿美元(约合人民币48亿元)。而《GTA6》显然碾压了所有这些数字。

paragraphs.en: Neither Take-Two nor Rockstar has explained the decision to go to $80 for GTA 6, but as reported by IGN, Zelnick told an audience at iicon recently that “consumers pay for the value that you bring to them, and our job is to charge way way way less of the value delivery. How you feel about something you buy is the intersection of the thing itself and what you pay for. Consumers need to feel like the thing itself is amazing and the price they were charged was fair for what they got.”
paragraphs.cn: Take-Two 和 Rockstar 都没有解释为什么《GTA6》定价会上调到80美元(约合人民币545元)，但据 IGN 报道，泽尼克近期在 iicon 大会上对现场观众表示：「消费者会为你带给他们的价值买单，而我们的工作就是收取远远低于我们交付价值的费用。你对购买的东西的感受，是产品本身和你付出的价格共同决定的。消费者需要觉得产品本身很棒，他们支付的价格相对于得到的东西是公平的。」

paragraphs.en: We’ve got plenty more on GTA 6 preorders for you, including analyst opinion on what GTA 6’s $80 price point means for other video games , a report on the retailers who are refusing to sell GTA 6 due to the lack of a disc , and the tech expert verdict on the 63 new screenshots .
paragraphs.cn: 关于《GTA6》预购，我们还有更多信息，包括分析师对《GTA6》80美元(约合人民币545元)定价对其他电子游戏意味着什么的看法，关于哪些零售商因缺少光盘而拒绝销售《GTA6》的报道，以及技术专家对63张新截图的评价。

paragraphs.en: Wesley is Director, News at IGN. Find him on Twitter at @wyp100. You can reach Wesley at wesley_yinpoole@ign.com or confidentially at wyp100@proton.me.
paragraphs.cn: Wesley 是 IGN 新闻总监。你可以在 X 上找到他 @wyp100。可通过 wesley_yinpoole@ign.com 联系 Wesley，或保密联系 wyp100@proton.me。
